findings.message: The client now adds a `include_location=true` query parameter to its request, but the consumer pact test (tests/functional/test_consumer_inventory.py) still declares `.with_request("GET", "/inventory/1")` with no query parameter, so the committed pact (pacts/demo-inventory.json) no longer matches the client's actual request. The pact will be stale until regenerated/published, and provider verification replays only the recorded (query-less) request — so it won't confirm the provider honors `include_location`.
findings.suggestion: Add the query parameter to the consumer interaction (e.g. `.with_query_parameter("include_location", "true")`) and regenerate + publish pacts/demo-inventory.json so the contract reflects the new request shape.
